english: I have a lot of money.
Yes, I have eaten.
He is very good.
He really likes to read.
I don't like coffee. / I don't want coffee (now).
to talk.
He loves to talk.
to drink boiled water.
Do you want a drink of water?
What is your surname?
None of them wants to study.

poj: Ū lâng ài lim kún-chúi bô·?
poj_sandhi: Ū3 lâng7 ài2 lim7 kún1-chúi1 bô·3?
english: Does anyone want a drink of water?
What do you want to drink?

poj: N̂g Siàn-si* bô sím-mih ài kóng-ōe.
poj_sandhi: N̂g7 Siàn2-si*7 bô7 sím1-mih2 ài2 kóng1-ōe.
english: Mr. N̂g is rather quiet (does not like to talk much / doesn't say much).
Mr. Lâu loves to talk.

poj: Góa sè* Lîm. Lí kùi sè*?
poj_sandhi: Góa1 sè*2 Lîm. Lí1 kùi2 sè*?
english: My surname is Lîm. What's yours?
I'm very sorry (e.g., for making a mess of things).
Please have some tea (OR: drinking water).

poj: Góa ài lim kún-chúi, bô ài lim tê-bí-tê.
poj_sandhi: Góa1 ài2 lim7 kún1-chúi, bô7 ài2 lim7 tê7-bí1-tê.
taiwanese_hanji: 我愛啉滾水, 無愛啉茶米茶.
english: I want to drink water, not tea.

poj: I chin ài kóng-ōe, bô ài tha̍k-chheh.
poj_sandhi: I7 chin7 ài2 kóng1-ōe, bô7 ài2 tha̍k3-chheh.
taiwanese_hanji: 伊真愛講話, 無愛讀冊.
english: He likes to talk; he doesn't like studying.
